title: Roasted Italian Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish with roasted Italian flavors and a crispy fry.

ingredients.name: roasted potatoes
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into fry shapes

instructions: Place the potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with stir fry oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat the Italian silky sauce in a pan over medium heat.
Add the tomato powder and stir to combine.
Once the potatoes are done, remove them from the oven and toss with the sauce.
